theme: The hidden cost of the cheapest vendor

linkedin.text:
The cheapest bid almost never stays the cheapest.

Here's the math procurement rarely sees up front. The low bid wins by trimming the line items that don't show in a quote: contingency, on-site staffing depth, backup suppliers, insurance headroom. Then reality arrives. A supplier folds two weeks out and you're rebooking at rack rate. AV under-specs the room and you pay for a rush upgrade on-site. One missed permit and the whole day slips.

We've seen a "15% cheaper" event end 30–40% over once the rework, overtime and risk are tallied — plus the cost you can't invoice: a flat experience for your people.

Real value isn't the lowest number. It's the number that doesn't move. That's what one accountable team protects. From business to pleasure.

Weighing bids for 2026? DM us or book a call.

#CorporateEvents #EventProduction #ProcurementInsights #IncentiveTravel
